---
title: "About"
---

# About
semesterbegleitende notes/essais/quellensammlungen.

> project arkkiv semi-komplett: [https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/blog](https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/blog/)

```{r}
#| echo: true
# A very long R line to show wrapping in PDF:
# paste("this-is-a-very-long-string", 1:100, collapse = " ")
print("engine on...")
```
